codes.E_INVALID_ARGUMENT: An argument to the function was invalid.
codes.E_INVALID_STATE: The operation is not valid in the current state.
codes.E_DISPOSED: The archive session or task has been disposed.
codes.E_INVALID_ARCHIVE: The archive file is corrupt or not a valid archive.
codes.E_UNSUPPORTED_FORMAT: The archive format is not supported.
codes.E_UNSUPPORTED_COMPRESSION: The compression method is not supported.
codes.E_UNSUPPORTED_ENCRYPTION: The archive encryption method is not supported by this platform or operation.
codes.E_PASSWORD_REQUIRED: A password is required to access encrypted entries.
codes.E_ENTRY_NOT_FOUND: No entry exists at the specified path.
codes.E_CHECKSUM_MISMATCH: CRC check failed for one or more entries.
codes.E_TRUNCATED_ARCHIVE: The archive file is truncated or incomplete.
codes.E_PATH_TRAVERSAL: Archive entry path attempts directory traversal.
codes.E_ABSOLUTE_PATH: Archive entry uses an absolute path.
codes.E_UNSAFE_SYMLINK: The symbolic link points outside the destination.
codes.E_SPECIAL_FILE: Special file types (device, FIFO, socket) are rejected.
codes.E_DUPLICATE_ENTRY: Multiple archive entries resolve to the same output path.
codes.E_EXTRACTION_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Extraction would exceed configured resource limits.
codes.E_ARCHIVE_TOO_LARGE: The archive exceeds the maximum allowed size.
codes.E_BUFFER_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Entry data exceeds the maximum buffer size.
codes.E_INSUFFICIENT_STORAGE: Not enough free disk space on the destination volume.
codes.E_PERMISSION_DENIED: The process does not have permission for this operation.
codes.E_PERMISSION_REQUIRED: A permission dialog must be completed first.
codes.E_SECURITY_SCOPE_REQUIRED: iOS security-scoped access is required for this URL.
codes.E_BOOKMARK_STALE: A security-scoped bookmark is stale and must be recreated.
codes.E_URI_PERMISSION_REVOKED: A URI permission grant has been revoked.
codes.E_URI_NOT_SEEKABLE: The content provider does not support seekable access.
codes.E_PROVIDER_UNSUPPORTED: The content provider does not support this operation.
codes.E_FILE_NOT_AVAILABLE: The file is not available locally (e.g., evicted from iCloud).
codes.E_IO: An I/O error occurred while accessing the archive.
